tool_input.command: cat processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-feature-details.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(s['id'], s['title']) for s in d['sections']]"

python3 -c "
import json
with open('processing-pattern/restful-web-service/restful-web-service-feature-details.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
for s in d['sections']:
    print(s['id'], s['title'])
"
